term: Ready or Not Here I Come
englishDefinitions: A phrase said before starting to search for people in a game like hide-and-seek.
Used more broadly to mean that something is about to begin whether people are prepared or not.
persianTranslation: آماده‌ای یا نه، من دارم می‌آیم
آماده باش یا نه، دارم می‌آیم
examples: Ready or not, here I come!
He shouted, 'Ready or not, here I come,' and started counting.
The movie title used the phrase ready or not, here I come.
